TEXT.Text: Can you be my friend?(2)
What should I give them? I want to give a present to the friends that you introduced me to.%% A present is all about heart, and I need some ingredients. You will help me out right?
You brought them? Thanks!
Ok, this is good. If you go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35), there will be Duraman and Raty. Defeat Duraman and Raty and bring me Rat tail and Rusty Armor. Please help me.
You're not going to help me? You don't want me to make a friend do you?
Please help me. I am very busy here. So you will to help me right?
Obtain Rat tail
Obtain Rusty Armor
Consideration of Ferguson(1)
Do you see that guy shaking in corner? I want to help him out. He is making me feel nervous.
This is good meat. Thank you.
He really needs to calm down. Please enter Dangerous Cavern[Arcade mode(F1)] and defeat Shroom and bring back 15 Shroom meat%% Then I am going to make him a soup to help him calm down.
You are ruthless
I will prepare the other ingredients.
Obtain Shroom meat
Ferguson's dangerous training
Wow this place isn't crowded. But a place like this is going to help me train a lot compared to the city. Do you want to know what it is?
Thanks! Now I can concentrate on my training.

When a human is in a dangerous situation, their skill and sense will sharpen up. I am here to sharped my skill and sense. But there is one problem.%% I need some time to train and all i see are Raccoon with a Pumpkin on his head and they are making me laugh, breaking my concentration. Every time I see them and their face's in Pumpkin... Hahaha!!! Even now, they are making me laugh !!! Hahaha!!!%% Please. Help me with this. Hahaha!! Please enter Arcade Mode(F1) and defeat 20 Pumpkin Heads. I want to train. Hahaha!!
Hmm! I will concentrate when I am fixing your weapon.
I must train. Then my sense will sharpen up.
Defeat Pumpkin Head
Testing a new weapon(1)

Hello. So I have purchased large amount of new weapons as I believe they will be a big hit. Haha.%% I need to start selling them but I am not quite ready yet. There is some help I need first haha, can you help me?
Thank you. I will prepare myself for battle! Now where is my Cape?....

This new sword is made for a beginner, for someone like me who has never trained can use them. %% I am planning to test the sword and then i can decide on a price for it. But I cannot find a place to test so I can not test them. I think Dangerous Cavern would be a good test, but the cave is too dangerous for me.%% One or two monsters is ok, but there is over ten monsters in there and that is going to be a tough test for a new weapon, think you can hadle it ? Please enter Dangerous Cave[Arcade Mode(F1)] and defeat 50 monsters.
If you don't help me, I can't do anything.
Once the test is over, I can sell them with a good price.
Defeat monsters at Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)]
Persistent personality
Argh! How do they know? How do they know!!!! Ah.. You are here. I need your help!
HA! I can finally calm down now. Thank you friend!

Everyone knows. EVERY ONE !!! Since yesterday, everyone has been teasing me. They start to call me Wet Pants Jess.%% This is all wrong. I am so angry that I can't sleep. This is all that Spark's fault.%% I need your help. Please teach them some manners! And not just once or twice. Enter Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F2)] and complete 50 combos
Are you going to make me angry?!?
Just punish them 50 times!!!
50 combo
Sofia nail care service
Hello. Are you busy? I can see your taste by what you are wearing.%% It seems there are many people with strange taste. Do want to hear it? While you are at it, you can help me too
Have you got the nails? Thank you. Here is some gold for your efforts.

I work as a manicurist as a second job when I am free. But one of the customer wants her nails to be done like a mummy.%% I would usually ignore such requests but she is very rich so I said I will do it. So I need some help with the ingredients. %% Enter Underground Graveyard(Lv35) and bring back 30 Mummy's Fresh nail. Please.
Fine! do not help me. Tsk!
Everyone has different taste i guess.
Obtain Fresh nail from Underground Graveyard Mummy
Cleaning Sofia
Hello. Do you have any urgent business? Then why are you in hurry? Come and listen to my story! Hoho.
Here is small fee for your service. Thank you for you help. Hoho.

I have a few side jobs to earn more money. I just want to be happy.%% To be happy, I need to have good food and a good house, so I have to work hard. But I think this time it was too much.%% I told my boss that I will defeat some monsters as he promised me a large sum of gold in return. But I can not defeat those monsters. Can you enter the Underground Graveyard and defeat 20 One-eyed Mummy for me? Please
You are not as busy as I am, so stop pretending to be. Humph!
Thank you.
Defeat One-eyed Mummies
Calm Chanpio(1)
Who is it!! Who is spreading these rumors?! I wont stand for this! Hey you! Come here.
Good! Now no one will believe the rumor. I will make sure that people know this was done by me. You should also keep this secret! OK? Here is something for your hard work.

You know how strong I am, right? But there is a strange rumor going around and I am not happy. Some one is saying that I am very very weak.%% Also they say that if I visit Underground Graveyard, I will lose to all the monsters. Enter Underground Graveyard(Lv35) and defeat 100 monsters for me.%% I could go but I am too busy with my other work here, of course you know that right? I will tell everyone that it was me who went to the Underground Graveyard, ok?!
What do you mean "no"? I am too busy to go right now.
Go and defeat those monsters for me, I am so angry!!
Underground Graveyard(Lv35) - Defeat 100 monsters
Delivery to Kalygon(3)
I know I shouldn't do it. Now I am stuck in the middle. What should I do?
Thank you! Oh thank you! Now all is ok.

I was planning to receive a box from Libra. But all the boxes were stolen. Some of boxes are for other people...%% Some of the boxes belong to Frank. Can you help me finding them? They were taken by Barrel Bones at Dangerous Cavern. I am sure of it!
Oh well. I am sure you have something to do
I am sure it was Barrel Bones!
Retrieve the Mystery Box
Safe Cave
Have you been to the Dangerous Cavern? I am planning a picnic with my children... I am thinking about going to Dangerous Cavern
(Explain the situation.) I guess that it's too dangerous. I will look for a place to have our picnic somewhere else.
Kids want to go picnic with a lunch. So I am looking for a picnic place... I am not sure how dangerous the Dangerous Caverns is.
So not bad right?? I think we will visit Dangerous Cavern.
Hmm ... Where would be good.
Conversation with Claire
Explore Dangerous Cavern
This is the fifth time that this has happened. Huh? This is the fifth times that a visitor went to Dangerous Cavern and came back injured. You are not going to ignore this? Right?...Right?!?
Oh you are back! I guess the cave is a bit safer now?

I told people not to visit Dangerous Cavern, but many still visit it because there is some special herbs in there. They know it's very dangerous but they still go.%% So I decided to reduce the number of Shroom, so the cave can become safer. Of course, I will require your help. %% Enter Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)] and defeat 30 Shrooms.
What do you mean no? People are getting hurt!?!
I will ban people from visiting the cave for a while.
Defeat Shrooms at Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)]
Testing new weapon(2)
Ohoh... I am hurt. Are you sure you have reduced the number of monsters? I went to visit but they took all my weapons and now I am injured.
Thank you.
You will help me? Thank you so much. Green Pong Whelps in Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)]. They took 10 beginners swords, please help me retrieve them.
That is it I am done!
Green Pong Whelp
Retrieve beginners sword from Green Pong Whelp
I found it finally! I found the one who was behind the scheme! Once I make him pay I will feel great again! My friends, please help me! Huh? Please!
Ah... That felt great! Whoever dares to attack me will surely pay for it!

I wanted to attack them myself but the leader is too strong for me to handle.%% If I attack I will definitely lose, but you can help me with this? This will be the last time i ask you for a favor! Enter Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)] and defeat Ahtoo.
I understand, even you will be scared of Ahtoo!
If you think it is too dangerous then come back.
Defeat Ahtoo
Pride of the Thief

Hut! H..He.. Hello. W..Wh..What? St ...Stu..Stuttering? What do you mean.. %% Stop asking! Do you really want to know? Really?!! Hmm... I was planning to tell no one about this... If you do hear my story, you have to help me. Are you up for it?

You sure you got them all? My fellow gang member might claim that I was scared at the time But I felt that I was cursed.%% This is small reward for you. I gave enough so if anyone asks, tell them the Mutant Spark was using a curse. Thanks.

Man! Whatever! You promised, so I will tell you. I was hiding something in the forest and was on my way back. %% It was very dark and there were chilling winds it felt like something was going to jump on me. %% Then suddenly a Spark appeared out of no where!! I was so.... surprised... and you know... in my trousers... I am not going to forgive them! %% Please go to Dangerous Cavern[Arcade Mode(F1)] and defeat 20 Mutant Sparks for me. I am very angry, I am not going to just take this!!!
What? You are scared of Spark Mutant also! You might make an accident in your trousers too!
You are still here? Are you scared?
Defeat Mutant Spark
Can you be my friend?(5)
Oh you are here? I thought about it! And now I realise that my presents were stupid. It was a mistake.%% Well. What is done is done .
Thank you You are a good friend to me.
(Talk to him.) What? You are my friend? Yes. Of course. You are my friend.%% That is good to know.
OK. I am going to take rest!
You are a good friend
Conversation with Larell
Making a quiet Graveyard(2)
There is a way. But it is too risky. Even for you!%% I do not want to lose a friend. ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... %% Really... Can you do it?
Unbelievable. I can not believe this. The Graveyard has become quiet %% All thanks to you Amazing!!!!!!
If you can enter the Underground Graveyard and defeat Bone Frag, Katler, Ratler and Kajimodo, it will become quiet.%% If it is possible, the Graveyard would be peaceful.
There is not many people who can do this. I understand!
If you feel like running away, please do not hesitate.
Defeat Bone Frag
Defeat Katler
Defeat Ratler
Defeat Kajimodo
What a girl wants(2)

Hello! Thank you for delivering my message. But there is something strange. I thought it would be ok once I delivered my thanks to him.%% But at night my heart is pounding and I can not sleep. Do you know why?
Really? You will find out about it? I think Claire will know about it. We are both women. She is more experience then me and she is also wiser.
You are not going to help me?
Have you asked? My heart is still pounding!
Haha... Really? Sofia is in love? Haha... When they are her age, they do fall in love deeply.
Conversation with Claire
What a girl wants(1)
Hello For who do you carry the fight in battle? Family? Yourself? Maybe someone you love?

What? Have I saved Sofia? Hmm i'm not sure. Ah! A couple of days ago Sofia was running away from a mouse and I helped her out by chasing the mouse. Is that what she is referring to? It was nothing really hehe!

A couple of days ago I was on my way home after work. I thought nothing would happen but there was a problem. A dangerous monster appeared and started threatening me. %% I was so scared, so I closed my eyes! When I opened my eyes the monster was gone but Swirl was standing behind me.%% I was so surprised, and I could not thank him. Would you deliver my thanks to Swirl for me?
As I regret, you will also regret not helping me.
Please deliver it!
Conversation with Swirl
What a girl wants(3)
Hello I am so tired. My heart is still pounding and I am getting really tired. I need to calm myself down, please help me.
Have you got it? Please give me the tablet! Gulp.%% Hmm... I think I am calming down. Thank you!
If you go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35), there are One-eyed Mummy. They sometimes drop a Chamomile tablet which is very good at calming people down. Can you get 1 tablet for me?
Ok, understood!
Flushing face. Pounding heart.
Obtain a Chamomile tablet
What a girl wants(4)
Hello. We are walking into each other a lot! I am not sure how the day is going these days. Because I am thinking of something else I keep making mistakes. I need some help!
What? Sofia wanted me to have this? I am not sure why, but I better thank her!

I think this is because I did not give any present to him. So I will send him a thank you present. %% From what I hear, at Underground Graveyard(Lv35) if you defeat Katler you can get a Warriors Sword. I heard this is a very good sword.%% Can you get it and deliver it to Swirl for me?
You are busy? Oh well. Bah!
Now that a present has been sent I will calm down a bit.
Obtain a Warrior Sword From Katler
If you're a hero then i must be a super Hero!

Ahahaha! Hey! You! Do you know how strong I am? A few years ago, monsters begged for their lifes when I even crossed their side. All of them are trembling with fear in front of me.%% Ha? Are you strong also? Well I will award that! But I doubt that you're as strong as I am! Ha-ha.
What?! I cannot believe you defeated that monster. Ahem.... See you later. I'm busy with other things.

If you're as strong as I am then you will need some proof. When you go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35), you'll see Ratler.%% You must be confident that killing Ratler won't be a big deal, right? I'll be looking forward to seeing you come back from that Graveyard haha. Don't come back to see me without some proof. Haha.
You see! You're already running away! Haha.
Oh, it's actually a dangerous job to do, yeah. You should admit it! You can't do it.
Underground Graveyard(Lv35) - Defeat Ratler
Calm Chanpio (2)
Hurry up!! Come and listen to me. I finally figured out who started this rumor. I found out!
Did you get Kajimodo's tooth? Okay, let me see it. Yeah this is it. Thank you so much!

I found out who's been spreading the rumor about me. I'm not going to stand for it anymore. Of course it will be you who takes care of that criminal.%% I'm too busy right now, you know.... So, go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35) and you'll see Kajimodo.%% Beat him as much as you like and take his tooth for me, okay?
What? You can't do it? I won't let you just walk out of here!! Urgg!!!!!
You don't need to listen to what he says, just do what I tell you to do. Okay?
Obtain Kajimodo's tooth
The Moonlight Graveyard campaign (1)
We should keep this place calm and peaceful so ancient souls can rest in peace. Do you have an idea? Umm? Any idea?

You want to make the Graveyard a quite and peaceful place? God, that's my long cherished dream. There's a way to make it come true.%% But I don't think there's anyone who can do it. I know your intentions are good but it's too dangerous1%% Anyway, I believe that someday this place will be better because there's hope in people like you!

I think I should discuss it with the grave keeper Larell. As it's quite a serious problem and I'll have to ask you to help me on this one. Please go to Larell and ask if he has any good ideas for this matter.
You got no ideas that would help with this case! ha!
I believe Larell would know something.
Talk to Larell
Can you be my friend?(1)

How's your day today? Did you sleep tight last night? For me it's still hard to take a good sleep. But, thankfully, I'm getting better from your help.%% What do I do when I'm not sleeping at night? I enjoy daydreaming usually.
Really? There is someone who'd like to get close to me? Who is that? Well, I can't believe you helped me this much, thank you.. you're so, thoughtful.

Do I get bored or feel lonely? Umm. No, I don't. If I were just a normal person I could have felt that way, but, I am already used to being alone.%% Moreover, I feel better when I'm alone sometimes. Well, it could be better if there was someone like you who always welcomed me. Because I never had that kind of friend before.
It's not really bad to be alone.
I wonder if it would be good for me to have a friend?
You're introducing me to a friend? Umm, that is good news for me.
To have a friend would be nice.... You're introducing a good friend to me? That's just great! And it's more than welcome!
Talk to Jess
Talk to Hunter G
Chanpio's injury
Argh ...Ouch! My elbow... Don't touch it. It's just killing me... I cannot move at all. Please help me out.
Thank you. If i use this my injury will be gone soon.

I was practicing very hard and by mistake I fell down on my elbow. It hurts a lot! I need some medicine for this injury, but I can't move at all because of pain.%% I hope you could get some medicine for me. I need Panaceal ointment that the Katler use. It's good for bones! Please bring it to me from the Underground Graveyard(Lv35).
This is too cruel, if I get better, I'll teach you some lessons you shouldn't forget.
Ouch... My elbow
Obtain Panaceal ointment
The 3 Habits of Highly Effective People (1)
It's been a while. what do you think makes a successful life? Making a lot of money? Being a hero and well known by many people?

Successful people have these three special habits. The first one is having a goal. I think I already told you about this. Even if we're having different goals to succeed we're still having the same route and steps.%% That route is the same as the goal to achieve. So to be one of the successful people, you should practice making a goal.

[There's no goal.] We all have different ideas for being successful. Some want money, when others want family.%% We cannot define "Success" with the same standard, but it certainly is the same to have a route to success. They must have been the same route to be successful.%% What do you say, wouldn't you learn the way to go through the route? Just talk to me when you're ready and I'll let you know!
You're not interested in Success? I don't believe it!
When you're ready come and talk to me.
Talk to Jesse
The 3 Habits of Highly Effective People (2)
It's time to teach you about the second habit. Are you ready to learn a new lesson?

Did you take good care of those monsters? What did you think of while you were killing monsters? What were you thinking, when you take one by one? It's hard, boring, you don't want to do this.. I bet you'd think of many things, but you see, there was something there to make put you on the right track.%% That was the goal and it made you to endure hardships. And to achieve the goal, patience is required. Patient people must become winners.%% This is the second lesson. Be patient!

[Success is 10% ability, and 90% sweat.] Have you heard of this proverb?%% I'll teach you about this proverb's meaning when you're back from this mission. Go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35) and kill 100 monsters.
You should be fully prepared. I'll teach you when you're ready to learn something.
It won't be easy to kill 100 monsters, but I'll teach you when you complete this mission.
Underground Graveyard(Lv35) - Defeat 100 monsters
The 3 Habits of Highly Effective People (3)

I'm sorry to say but this will be our last lesson. Think of your last lessons, having a plan and being patient. %% Actually, planning and patience are only one of the preparations to being successful. Do you understand?

I can see that you've done a very good job. Yeah, did you think of the tips from the last lesson? I'll tell you the meaning now.%% Opportunity will be given to anyone who has a plan and has patience. But at the moment, being courageous is really important to take the opportunity.%% You wait for the opportunity with plans and patience, and take it with your courage. I hope you understand what I'm trying to say here. If you fully understand this, you will succeed.
Okay, I'll give you mission as usual. Go to Underground Graveyard(Lv35) and defeat Bone Frag. While you're doing the mission, you should think of this proverb.%% [Courage is the father of success.]
Then I cannot help you with being successful.
You're not scared now are you?
Underground Graveyard(Lv35) - Defeat Bone Frag
A bold personality
Sigh ... oh hi! Why do I look so down today? No...I just don't feel good today... Well... I'm sorry to say this, but
Thank you. I hope you could keep this as a secret between you and me.

Urm... First of all, I should thank you for your help. I know that it could be too much for me to ask, but could I ask you one more thing? Actually, I lost something that time, I was too shocked and I dropped those.%% What was that ? I was on the way to hide coins on that day, and I lost all of them. That's what this is about. Fallen coins seem to be taken by Shroom Thief.. I didn't want to talk about this... I was so embarrassed, and I couldn't tell you about the coins.%% But, those coins are a really important thing for me. Please go to Dangerous Caverns [Arcade Mode(F1)] and defeat Shroom Thief and bring 20 Coins back to me.
Fine. I'll take care of it myself.
Did you find some coins?!
Obtain Jess's coin
Mom's Love
Did you see my children's faces? It's just too bad. I feel sorry that they've got no place to hang out. Please help us.
Oh my, thank you very much, my children will be happier than I am! I'll go to my children to deliver this good news.

There was a place where children used to go, like a playground, it can't be reached anymore though. Because there are so many Shroom Assassin there. Every day the children feel bad about it and stay at home. It seems to be making them feel worse.%% Please help us to find a safe place for the children, %class%. Go to Dangerous Caverns[Arcade(F1)] and defeat 20 Shroom Assassin for my children, please.
My children don't smile as much as they did before.
You're working very hard for us, please have some tea and take a rest.
Defeat Shroom Assassin
Delivery to Kalygon(1)
Hero, Have you ever been to the sea? What kind of weapon would be useful in the Sea?
(Give him some hints.) Wow, you know a lot about this! Have you been near the Sea shore?%% Aha! You must have been in Port of Winds. It helped me a lot, thanks.

Actually, there's one client from Dangerous Caverns. A pirate captain called Kalygon... I've heard that he's fastidious.%% I have been thinking what kind of weapon would be good for him but I never experienced going to Sea, so I'm just worried if my weapon will please him Please take a look at these and which one would be good for him.
You've never been in the Sea, right?
Please let me know which one looks better.
Talk to Frank
Delivery to Kalygon(2)

The sword that the Hero selected hasn't been delivered to Kalygon, yet. I heard that Hime has some potions to deliver, so I asked him to deliver the weapon with those...%% I'm not sure if he completed his job. Please ask him if he did.
Honestly, there are other things to take care of, so I couldn't get the weapon yet. Very good, can you help me?
I asked Hime to help me with the weapon, so please ask him.
It's not a difficult thing to do! I feel sorry.
Please ask him.
Talk to Hime
Load a gun.
Hey, you got a minute? I need your help.
Okay that's enough! I'm a sharpshooter.

That is not good at all. I rushed and forgot to bring bullets for my gun, now I'm in trouble.%% Please deliver some bullets to me. It's an emergency! When you go to Dangerous Caverns[Arcade Mode(F1)], you will see Reckless Spark.%% Please bring me 20 Iron Bullets from them.
Why can't you understand my situation? Hey! Hey!!!
20 Iron Bullets will be enough.
Obtain Iron Bullet
Kalygon's training method
You made it. I'll teach you my special training method that I'm doing twice a day. How is that? Doesn't it sound interesting?
Can you feel your skill improving?

I'm doing a 100 Combo almost every day for my training. It will be good for you to try this method too.%% Go to Dangerous Caverns[Arcade Mode(F1)] and achieve a 100 Combo. You will see your skills improve a lot when you finish this mission.
Are you satisfied with your power?
It won't be easy to achieve a 100 Combo!
Dangerous Caverns - Achieve 100 Combo
Sen's escape
%class%. This place is too scary. Where am I? What should I do to get out of here?
Sorry? Are you telling me that %class% can change Dangerous Caverns? Do you want me to stay here a little while? If %class% say so I believe you can make it happen. I'll wait for you.
Is there no other way? I think this place can't be a good market... What should I do for a living?
There's no way to get out of here, right?
I want to get out of here.
Talk to Sen
Scrupulous Edelin
Hello. %name%. Can you do me a favor?
I'm impressed that Edelin did all this work in {C=0xFF016295/}Specter's Tower{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm aware that you also helped her a lot. I'll talk to Sovereign about this.

I think you should convey the {C=0xFF016295/}Specter's Tower{C=0xFF4D0D08/}'s situation now. Go to Port of the Winds and tell Guard Captain Colin about this issue. I'll defeat the rest of monsters and get back to you.
I hope you could carry this thing to perfection, but what can I say.
It's Colin in Port of Winds.
Talk to Colin
Please talk to me about the results. I know that I've been chosen. You thought the same thing, didn't you?%% Ah! So what happened finally? (Talk to him about the result)%% Ah.. Lost?.. Nooo!!!!
When did you come here? Frank made you to come here, right? Please say that I won.%% (Talk to him about the result.) I knew it. Thank you for telling me the results.
Talk to Jess

Hoho. So, Sofia's suffering that symptom, right? It must be the disease called Love. For someone of Sofia's age it's very common to with suffer that so please talk to her and tell her that there's no need to worry.
How could you have lost it?!? ... You will pay for it!
What can I do for you?
Defeat Shroom Assassin
Defeat Shroom Thief
Defeat Karkarous
Obtain Rusty Armour
Talk to Hunter G
A Hero Must Be Courageous! (1)
Collecting Mer Gon's Eyeball

Hey you over there! Where are you off to? I can clearly see you're still a novice, am I wrong?%% Oh...? You want to prove me wrong? Fine... Let's see what you got. %%There is a place called Underground Graveyard around here, That place is full of vicious monsters with huge glaring eyes. Are you getting scared already?%%Those monsters are called Mergons. Bring me 30 eyes from them and then I'll acknowledge your courage.
I knew you had it in you when I first saw you!! Now go and have some fun.
Pfft.. I see you are acting like a Hero after all.
You haven't collected enough yet? Or are you just too scared to go?
Oh! Nice job! I'll acknowledge your worth as a Hero. Just barely though, hahaha!!
A Hero Must Be Courageous! (2)
Collect 30 Zombie Leathers

Oh brave Hero, you did well on your last mission, Well it was a very easy mission. At least I know you have the basics down. Now let me give you your next mission.%%What? You thought there was no more? I see you've taken me too lightly. I will give you a real test this time. How about it? You can tell me if you're too scared. Hahaha
You have chosen wisely. Well, it's similar to the last mission. Go defeat the Zombies at the Underground Graveyard and bring me 30 of their leather.
Ugh, so you can't do it after all.. I'm disappointed
You haven't collected enough yet? Or are you just too scared to go?
Whoa!! You've got them already? You are really something special. Nice job! You're looking more like a great Hero now!
A Hero Must Be Courageous! (3)
Kill 20 Mergons
Kill 20 Zombies
Kill 20 Underground Graveyard Mummies

Oh.. There is a strong aura around you. Now the only thing left is to be acknowledged as a mighty Hero.%%You seem annoyed that there is another mission... A Hero never moans. Anyways, only the last mission remains. Are you up to for it? %% Well if you're not a true hero you don't have to..? I'm sure you want to be a true hero, right? Then, you can't give up now.%%This mission is even simpler, Go to Underground Graveyard and just defeat everything in sight. Will you do it?
I knew you would accept it!, hahaha!! Now, go to Underground Graveyard and kill 20 each of Mergons, Zombies, and Underground Graveyard Mummies.
So this is your limit? I was a fool to expect greatness from you.
What are you waiting for?
You look truly exhausted, but from your smile I can tell you have succeeded. Good job, you are now a true hero!
The Rare and Valuable are Needed
Collect 30 Treasure Pocket

In this bad economy it's hard to find any customers. I need some rare items to attract more customers but sadly I don't have any. %% Excuse me, %name%. Can you please help me out? There is a rumor that the monsters at Kalygon Fleet stole treasure from the pirates' hideout. %% Anyways, if you can get me the treasures by defeating those monsters, it would help me greatly.
You will do it!? Thank you! . I will reward you handsomely.
I see.. You don't care about anyone but yourself. Don't even think about coming to my store again!
Not finished yet? I'm losing money everyday!
Thank you! You saved my business! These will surely bring more customers in. I really appreciate it!
Aggressive marketing is the key to success!
Kill 50 monsters at Underground Graveyard

Hey there hero.. Real estate is one of the most profitable investment options. Just finding a new area to develop will earn you a lot of money, %%Speaking of a new area, can you go check out Underground Graveyard for me? It's cool and quiet down there and since many people have gone down there recently I want know if I should invest in the area. %% But it's still too dangerous for me to walk around down there. I can't wait until all the monsters go away, please defeat the monsters for me.
Thanks for accepting. You only have to kill about 50 monsters at the Underground Graveyard.
Pfft.. I can just ask someone else to do it! Now go away.
It's not done yet. Please hurry, I want to see the area as soon as possible.
Thank you, I can head down there safely now, please accept this as a reward.
Find the Lost Holy Water
Collect 30 Holy Water

Something terrible has happened. I lost the {C=0xFF4D0D08/}Holy Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/} needed for the ceremony. It was actually taken from me. It took me a long time to obtain that {C=0xFF4D0D08/}Holy Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, what am I to do now? %%Please listen to my story, I was returning from {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} when I ran into those damned skeletons. They were chasing me for so long, I ended up losing all of the {C=0xFF4D0D08/}Holy Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'm sure the skeletons have them now. Can you go bring the {C=0xFF4D0D08/}Holy Water{C=0xFF4D0D08/} back to me?"

Really? You will get them for me? Go to {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Thunker{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Skull Clubber{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for the items.
Oh I see you are too busy.. You really are heartless.
There isn't much time left before the ceremony. Please hurry.
Thank you! I can hold the ceremony now. I was wondering what I would do if you failed. Thank you again.
Hero's Feast. (1)
Collect 10 Delicious Skulls(Mirinae Sanctuary)

Hahaha, Look at my muscles. Are you jealous? Do you want to know the secret? It's because I eat the Hero's Feast. If you truly are a hero, shouldn't you eat it as well? You never know when you will need it. Aren't you curious? %%I needed to get the ingredients anyways, but if you get them for me I'll let you know the secret!
Thanks for accepting the offer. There are monsters called Skull Thunker at Mirinae Sanctuary. Defeat them and bring me 10 Nutritious Bones.
Really? You don't want to be muscular like me?
Do you have them yet? The water's boiling already, hurry!
Oh.. These are perfect. They may look disgusting, but it's the best ingredient. Good job!
Hero's Feast. (2)
Rib Bone with a Little Meat(Mirinae Sanctuary)

The meal is almost done. It smells good doesn't it? The secret..? Oh yeah, I was supposed to tell you right? Actually, I need one more ingredient for the meal. I'll tell you the secret if you get me those ingredients. How does that sound?
Hahaha, thanks for accepting the offer. There are monsters called Skull Clubber at Mirinae Sanctuary. Defeat them and bring me 15 Rib Bones with a Little Meat.
You must not be hungry.. How can you pass on this delicious meal?
It's almost done! I need the ribs to complete it. Please hurry.

Good job! I can complete the meal now. What? I need to give you something? Ah, the secret? I guess I have to tell you. The secret is that after you eat it you feel sleepy. Then after you rest you'll feel revived and stronger. That's it, hahaha! %% Huh? What is this unsatisfied look you are giving me?
A Child's Memories
Defeat 30 Starry Lulu (Kalygon Fleet)
Defeat 30 Starry Lolo (Kalygon Fleet)

Mister can I tell you my story? %% Ever since I was young I shared my dreams and wishes with the stars. But, {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulu{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and Lolos ruined, what would have been a beautiful memory. %% I went to {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and saw a star shaped object, and when I reached out for it, it attacked me. I was so shocked, all I remember is running away crying. %% Being chased by something I love so much and it threatens my life.. It just upsets me so much%% Please teach those monsters some lessons for ruining my beautiful memories. If you do that for me, I may be able to give you some money for your journey.

Really, You will do it? Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Kalygon Fleet{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFF4D0D08/}30 of each{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lolos{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Starry Lulus{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Please be careful!!
Oh I see.. You are too busy to care about a child's precious memories.
Not yet? I'm still frightened of stars, please hurry.
Thank you mister! Even though my memories have been ruined, I won't be frightened so much. Please accept my token of appreciation.
Inn's 10 Year Anniversary
Collect 20 Shark's Fin (Nautilus Port)

Oh no.. I don't have enough time.. Hey, you've stayed at my inn before right? Can you do me a favor?.%% Next week is the inn's 10 year anniversary. I'm hosting a celebration party and the main course is going to be a shark's fin dish. But the fish markets are closed due to a strike. I have all ingredients except the {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark's Fin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. It would be great if you can help me out.%% It's not too difficult. Just go to {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and get me about {C=0xFF4D0D08/}20{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark's Fin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from the Shark Pirates. I'll pay you handsomely for them, and of course you would be invited to the party.
Really? Thanks for offering to help. You can get them from {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Pirates{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and {C=0xFFFF5917/}Shark Deckands{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Nautilus Port{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You're too busy? Well the party's cancelled then.. By the way, you need to pay for your overdue fees....
There isn't much time left before the party. I can't make anything before I get them. Please hurry!
Wow, these are really fresh! Thanks! I think these will make a great main course. Thanks again, you are coming to the party right? Here's your reward.
